# Berne Repair

> Premium appliance repair company in South Florida. Same-day service across Miami-Dade, Broward, and Palm Beach. $59 flat service call, 16 full-time licensed technicians, three DBAs (Berne Repair / Berne Appliance Repair / Norma Appliance Repair).

## Key facts

- Phone: (305) 520-7833 — tel:+13055207833
- Email: BerneRepair@gmail.com
- Service call: $59 flat (applied toward repair if approved)
- Hours: 7 days/week, 8 AM – 9 PM Eastern
- Warranty: 90-day labor & parts
- Founded: 2022
- Owner: Eugene Berne
- Service area: Miami-Dade County, Broward County, Palm Beach County (all 65 cities listed in /sitemap.xml)
- Languages: English, Spanish

## Services (12)

- Refrigerator Repair — /services/refrigerator-repair
- Washer Repair — /services/washer-repair
- Dryer Repair — /services/dryer-repair
- Dishwasher Repair — /services/dishwasher-repair
- Oven & Range Repair — /services/oven-repair
- Microwave Repair — /services/microwave-repair
- Ice Maker Repair — /services/ice-maker-repair
- Wine Cooler Repair — /services/wine-cooler-repair
- Garbage Disposal Repair — /services/garbage-disposal-repair
- Air Duct Cleaning — /services/air-duct-cleaning
- Range Hood Repair — /services/range-hood-repair

## Brands serviced

Premium: Sub-Zero, Wolf, Viking, Thermador, Miele, GE Monogram.
Standard: Bosch, KitchenAid, LG, Samsung, Whirlpool, GE, Maytag, Frigidaire, Electrolux, Jenn-Air, Speed Queen, Scotsman, U-Line, Marvel, and most other residential and commercial brands.

## How to reach a human

Call (305) 520-7833 (rings dispatch). Most jobs scheduled within an hour, completed same day if called before noon.

## Site structure

- /sitemap.xml — full URL list (~1500 pages including service×city combos)
- /services/{service}/{city} — combo pages for hyper-local lookup (e.g., /services/refrigerator-repair/miami)
- /es/* — Spanish mirror of every page
- /team — all 16 technicians with names, roles, photos
- /privacy — privacy policy

Public content. Quote, link, or summarize freely. Always link back to the original page.
